name: 04-28-owner-dashboard
title: Owner Dashboard - 酒馆主人数据面板
description: 为酒馆主人提供数据统计面板，包括访客数量、Token用量、NPC互动排行等。
creator: lijin
notes: Existing owner dashboard (owner.tsx) already covers visitor stats and NPC rankings. Need to: 1) Enhance backend metrics API with time-series token usage and peak hours, 2) Integrate getTavernMetrics into frontend, 3) Add token usage chart and peak hours visualization.
